title: Opening for Logistics Manager at Swiggy Logistics

jsonLd.title: Opening for Logistics Manager at Swiggy Logistics
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Swiggy Logistics! We are hiring a Logistics Manager for our Bhopal team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Swiggy Logistics:
Swiggy Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in SAP SCM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Swiggy Logistics!
